name: klip4ge-fb-saves-scraper
description: One-click hourly Facebook Saves sync agent for Klip4ge — personal use only

scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium && node setup.js
scripts.agent:status: node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('agent-state.json'));console.log(JSON.stringify(s,null,2));}catch{console.log('No state file found — run setup first.')}"
scripts.agent:logs: tail -50 agent.log 2>/dev/null || echo 'No log file yet.'
